mapper.insert: INSERT INTO oj_problem (title, description, difficulty, time_limit, memory_limit, input_description, output_description, sample_input, sample_output, status, create_user_id, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{title}, #{description}, #{difficulty}, #{timeLimit}, #{memoryLimit}, #{inputDescription}, #{outputDescription}, #{sampleInput}, #{sampleOutput}, #{status}, #{createUserId}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE oj_problem SET submit_count = submit_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE oj_problem SET accepted_count = accepted_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT tag_id FROM oj_problem_tag_relation WHERE problem_id = #{problemId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM oj_problem WHERE status = 1
SELECT * FROM oj_problem WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id LIMIT 1 OFFSET #{offset}
